dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Come to me, shadows of Thriller bark....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and collecting them into his own body!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The number of Shadows you had...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: It's over...!!! What the hell is that!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now Moria has ten times that amount!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What's with this, now...!!? This can't be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Strawhat's shadow is in there, too.
